description: User identity verification and authentication mechanisms. MFA enforcement, password policies, SSO configuration, session management.

subcriteria.name: mfa_enforcement
subcriteria.reference_text: Multi-factor authentication enforced for all users across all systems. MFA required at login, not optional. Screenshot or configuration showing enforcement.

subcriteria.name: password_policy
subcriteria.reference_text: Password complexity requirements including minimum length, character types, rotation period, and history restrictions.

subcriteria.name: sso_configuration
subcriteria.reference_text: Single sign-on configuration with identity provider integration. SAML, OAuth, or OIDC setup. Centralized authentication management.

subcriteria.name: session_management
subcriteria.reference_text: Session timeout settings, automatic logout after inactivity, session token management.

mismatch_signals.reason: Document requests users enable MFA but does not prove it is enforced. Requests do not equal enforcement.
Login page screenshot shows the interface exists but not that MFA is enforced.
Document appears to be about encryption/transport security (CC6.7), not authentication (CC6.2).
